title: I used my still limited ai knowledge + my trading technical knowledge to develop a 1:4 at 70% WR model
author: JayCircuits
selftext:
Starting this year i decided i had to figure things out. I started to screenshot the 1m chart at around two different times, that i believed to be the times where most of the runs took place. Months of data (captures) and a $20 Claude plan later I was able to build this model and officially started implementing it at the beginning of May. 

My approach to ai was slightly different. I fed it with these sessions well documented data and i gave it the instructions on what i believed to be the pattern. It ended up taking my approach, but giving me a slightly different outcome, i was able to jump on this outcome and developed this model. No automation, no coding, just two brains looking at a lot of data and interpreting the best possible model out of it. 

I started documenting my progress live last week. Every day im uploading the analysis and the trades im taking right from my iPhone. Which is the best part. No need to be on my PC following indicators or anything like that. This has been the power of ai to me. In many of the videos you will hear me say that im out playing basketball and took a quick break to take the entry and then back to the court, to then come back to a full 1:4 take profit. Again, this is what the power of ai has been for me. From my phone while hanging out. Crazy to me.

replies.author: JayCircuits
replies.body: Certainly not rich yet, but happy to be out of the chart creeping game for sure

comments.author: Due_Communication849
comments.body: Would you be willing to provide some more proof of concept about it like how exactly you did it cause 🤔 feeding so much data to ai seems pretty hard and is it a strategy on pine script would you be willing to provide the code

replies.author: JayCircuits
replies.body: It wasnt code it was basically analyzing the screenshots to find patterns oriented towards finding patterns at reversals. Now that i have the data i could code it, but its so simple that i dont have any issue doing it myself for now. Im doing June and if in able to make good profit this would be the third month in a row and at this point i might just code it and go after other endeavors.

replies.author: Due_Communication849
replies.body: Would you be willing to teach

replies.author: JayCircuits
replies.body: To be honest, my goal for now with this channel is to enable livestreams and livestream my sessions with folks interested in taking trades from my areas of interest. I guess eventually people would learn from them, but i dont know about teaching in a course type of model.
